steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content: In an isosceles triangle, perimeter equals the sum of all three sides. With two congruent sides of 22 feet each and total perimeter of 78 feet: $$22 + 22 + x = 78$$ where $x$ is the unknown third side.

steps.title: Solve for the third side
steps.content: $$44 + x = 78$$ $$x = 34$$ That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
